changes: Removed manual featuredMediaUrl useSelect (coreStore.getMedia) — ImageDropUploader handles its own URL fetching via fetchMedia internally

Replaced static / placeholder
in photo area with ImageDropUploader
onSelect calls editPost({ featured_media: selected.id || 0 }) to persist as post thumbnail
image prop passed as { id: featuredMediaId || null } to connect to current featured_media value

componentUsed.name: ImageDropUploader

props.image: { id: featuredMediaId || null } — connects to featured_media post attribute

componentUsed.behavior: Supports drag-and-drop file upload and click-to-open media library. Shows uploaded image when set; shows dark placeholder with image icon when unset. Handles its own image URL fetching via fetchMedia internally.

buildStatus.note: Pre-existing lint errors in MainWrapper, FullWidthMedia, and TestimonialsCarousel unchanged. Zero new errors introduced.

fixesApplied: Replace static photo display with interactive ImageDropUploader in card preview body
